untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern detection requires multi-bar peak identification and valley analysis that cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. Conditions requiring: (1) identification of two peaks at equal heights within 0-3% variation, (2) temporal separation of 2-6 weeks, (3) valley detection between peaks, (4) volume comparison across multiple bars, and (5) confirmation below valley low. These require pattern recognition logic unavailable in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted simplified proxy using support level (s1 as estimated valley confirmation) and volume/price action reversal logic, but this does not capture the core pattern geometry. A proper Double Top detector requires dedicated pattern-matching logic outside standard indicator framework. For backtesting, recommend implementing a custom Double Top detection function that identifies local peaks, validates separation timing, confirms volume divergence, and validates breakout confirmation.
